items.title: What should businesses do when AI changes jobs?
items.businessQuestion: When AI can automate parts of a job, should a business invest more in new technology, employee training, or redesigned roles?
items.connection: This connects to the Course Introduction because BUS123 is about using technology thoughtfully, not just adopting tools. Students can see how business technology decisions affect workflows, skills, and people.
items.discussionPrompt: Think about a job you have had, want, or know well. Name one task AI could help with, one skill a person would still need, and one decision a manager should make before using AI in that role.
